find.match_belief: Someone sees the machinery reshaping their neighborhood and power moves in that room.

profile.belief: Giving people the data to see the system gives them the ground to fight back from.
profile.working_on: Installation merging property data with spatial audio so displacement becomes something you can hear moving.

hidden_prompt: Somewhere in this room is the person behind "Animating character fear through micro-gestures—eye flickers, breath catches—so subtle audiences feel it before they know they're watching." Go find them.
magic_inference: You are driven by a desire to empower others, transforming abstract data into an immersive experience that fosters awareness and resilience.
